name: worktime-pwa
description: 明薪记：离线优先的跨平台工时、加班、薪资和个税记录应用。
author: yuan-666 <2991077067@qq.com>

scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:android: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:ios: npm run build && npx cap sync ios
scripts.dist:android:debug: npm run cap:android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.dist:self: npm run assets:native && npm run cap:sync && npm run release:prepare
